testcase.name: test_etsy_sync_without_connection

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('etsy' in '' or 'connection' in '') + where '' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf813d70f0be8>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf813d70f0be8> = ''.lower + where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf813d4774440>('detail', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf813d4774440> = {'error': {'code': 'HTTP_404', 'message': 'No active etsy connection found'}, 'success': False}.get + and '' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf813d70f0be8>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf813d70f0be8> = ''.lower + where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf813d4774440>('detail', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf813d4774440> = {'error': {'code': 'HTTP_404', 'message': 'No active etsy connection found'}, 'success': False}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_connection_wizard_sync.py:112: in test_etsy_sync_without_connection assert "etsy" in data.get("detail", "").lower() or "connection" in data.get("detail", "").lower() E AssertionError: assert ('etsy' in '' or 'connection' in '') E + where '' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf813d70f0be8>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf813d70f0be8> = ''.lower E + where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf813d4774440>('detail', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf813d4774440> = {'error': {'code': 'HTTP_404', 'message': 'No active etsy connection found'}, 'success': False}.get E + and '' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf813d70f0be8>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf813d70f0be8> = ''.lower E + where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf813d4774440>('detail', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf813d4774440> = {'error': {'code': 'HTTP_404', 'message': 'No active etsy connection found'}, 'success': False}.get
